props.name: max
props.description: The maximum selectable date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 5 years in the future.

props.name: min
props.description: The minimum selectable date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 5 years in the past.

props.name: name
props.description: Name identifier for the calendar, included in change events.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: value
props.description: The currently selected date value in YYYY-MM-DD format.

events.name: onChange
events.description: Callback fired when the selected date changes.

props.name: bordered
props.description: Shows a border around the calendar. Set to false when embedding within another component.
